data.title: Bank7 Corp. (NASDAQ: BSVN) renews stock repurchase plan for two years; board of directors authorizes.
data.description: Bank7 Corp., the parent company of Bank7 located in Oklahoma City, has declared the extension of its current stock repurchase program by its board of directors. The renewed program will span two years. The Company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol BSVN. The announcement was made on August 25, 2025.

data.title: Going introduces 2025 Flight Deal Awards, ranking U.S. airports and airlines for airfare value. NEW YORK, Aug. 25, 2025 /PRNewswire.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on August 25, 2025, Going introduced the 2025 Flight Deal Awards to honor the most and least favorable airports and airlines for securing cost-effective flight options. This annual ranking aims to spotlight the top-performing U.S. airports and airlines offering exceptional value for airfares, providing useful insights for travelers seeking economical flight deals.

data.title: Organ donor Claire Rossi's family met the man whose life she saved at 70. Powerful connection underlines organ donation impact.
data.description: In a heartwarming event, LiveOnNY facilitated the emotional meeting between the family of 70-year-old organ donor Claire Rossi and the recipient whose life she saved. This powerful demonstration of the impact of organ donation took place on Aug. 25, 2025, in New York. The touching reunion highlighted the significance of organ donation, with the recipient expressing gratitude for the life-changing gift. The story showcases the incredible bond forged through donation, emphasizing the profound difference it makes in people's lives.

data.title: St. John's University implements Ellucian Student platform for better campus operations.
data.description: Ellucian, a top provider of higher education technology solutions, has launched a new platform aimed at improving the student experience and optimizing campus operations. The announcement was made on August 25, 2025, in Queens, N.Y. and Reston, Va. Specifically, St. John's University, a prominent Catholic institution, is set to benefit from this initiative. Ellucian's platform is designed to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in various campus processes, catering to the needs of students and staff. This development showcases the company's commitment to driving innovation in the education sector.

data.title: Disney celebrates World Princess Week with new content, music from Jacob Collier, featuring Jodi Benson, Auli'i Cravalho, Paige O'Hara, and Anika Noni Rose.
data.description: Recently, a brand new commercial was released featuring music by seven-time Grammy® Award winner Jacob Collier, highlighting the boundless creativity drawn from Disney princesses. The spot unites iconic voices like Jodi Benson, Auli'i Cravalho, Paige O'Hara, and Anika Noni Rose. This collaboration aimed to showcase the enchanting world of Disney with a fusion of talent and imagination. The ad is set to captivate audiences with its magical essence and is expected to gain significant traction given the renowned artists involved.

data.title: Alloy wins Datos Insights 2025 Fraud & AML Impact Award for Best KYC/KYB Innovation. Alloy for Embedded Finance recognized.
data.description: In New York on August 25, 2025, Alloy, a prominent provider of identity verification and fraud prevention services, received recognition for its groundbreaking innovation in Know Your Customer/Business (KYC/KYB). The company's Sponsor Banks solution, Alloy for Embedded Finance, was awarded the title of Best in KYC/KYB Innovation. This acknowledgment highlights Alloy's commitment to delivering cutting-edge technology in the finance industry.

data.title: Galderma releases Cetaphil Nourishing Oil to Foam Cleanser: combines hydration and cleansing, 24-hour moisture, backed by dermatologists.
data.description: A new dual-phase skincare innovation has been introduced that effectively removes makeup, excess oil, and dirt, providing 24 hours of hydration without drying out the skin. The formula has been endorsed by Board-certified dermatologist Dr. Angelo Landriscina, highlighting its science-backed approach and the presence of dermatologist-trusted ingredients. This product has gained popularity among Gen Z individuals, with impressive numbers of positive feedback and support.

data.title: Clipper Distributing partners with Butterfly Network to expand access to portable diagnostic imaging for animals.
data.description: Clipper Distributing has collaborated with Butterfly Network to enhance accessibility to top-notch, portable point-of-care diagnostic imaging for animals in St. Joseph, Missouri.

data.title: BOBS from Skechers continues Paws for a Cause Design Scholarship for the third year.
data.description: In Los Angeles, BOBS® from Skechers® has revealed the launch of the third annual Paws for a Cause Design Scholarship. This initiative aims to support aspiring designers with a passion for creating innovative footwear and giving back to the community. The scholarship offers a significant monetary award to talented individuals who demonstrate creativity, originality, and a commitment to philanthropy. This marks the third consecutive year that the program has been offered, highlighting the brand's dedication to fostering creativity and social responsibility within the industry.

data.title: Kraft Heinz to discuss business strategy at Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference on Sept. 3, 2025, at 10:30 am EST
data.description: A company, Kraft Heinz (Nasdaq: KHC), will be part of a fireside chat at the Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference on Sept. 3, 2025. The discussion on the company's business strategy will commence at 10:30 a.m. Eastern time. For those interested, a live webcast can be accessed at ir.kraftheinzcompany.com. Following the event, a replay will be accessible on the same website for six months. This information was provided without mentioning the original source.

data.title: FDA gives Quest Diagnostics' Haystack MRD Circulating Tumor DNA Test Breakthrough Device Designation,2015.
data.description: Today, in Secaucus, New Jersey, Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX), a prominent company offering diagnostic information services, revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has awarded Breakthrough Device Designation for their Haystack MRD® test. This innovative test aims to revolutionize MRD detection in patients with certain conditions.

data.title: Book by Dr. Edward Bruce Bynum features doctor and embodiment of poetry travelling the world, with a love affair.
data.description: In Amherst, Massachusetts on August 25, 2025, Dr. Edward Bruce Bynum, Ph.D., a clinical psychologist and poet, released a novel centered around a young Black child's growth. The narrative follows two individuals on a joint expedition, engaging with extraordinary individuals and embarking on a passionate romance. This latest book explores themes of love and personal development, shedding light on diverse characters and their experiences.

data.title: D1 Training's new podcast, The Turf, features CEO Will Bartholomew and Vanderbilt Head Football Coach Clark Lea. Expands reach and authority in training.
data.description: Launching on August 27, a new show will offer training and coaching discussions with athletes, leaders, and influencers. The first episode will feature Vanderbilt's Head Football Coach Clark Lea. This initiative aims to broaden D1's impact and strengthen its position in athletic training and franchise expansion. Located in Nashville, Tennessee, this series promises to provide valuable insights for a wide audience.

data.title: PCM Trials, EmVenio Research, and Clinical Trial Service merge into EmVenio Clinical Research to enhance global trial access and introduce Patient Navigator™.
data.description: EmVenio Clinical Research is enhancing its reach in global trials through rebranding and introducing the new Patient Navigator™ program to enhance accessibility for trial candidates. The consolidation involves PCM Trials, EmVenio Research, and Clinical Trial Service. This move aims to broaden the company's global trial access and streamline services for participants. The announcement was made in Denver on August 25, 2025, underlining the commitment to growth and improved engagement in clinical research.

data.title: FYZICAL Therapy & Balance Centers partners with VeDA to promote National Balance Awareness Week in September 2025.
data.description: FYZICAL Therapy & Balance Centers is teaming up with the Vestibular Disorders Association (VeDA) to honor National Balance Awareness Week on August 25, 2025. The Sarasota-based company, a prominent physical therapy brand with a national presence, is spearheading the initiative. They are encouraging participation in communities across the country to raise awareness about the importance of balance.

data.title: Everest Medicines (HKEX: 1952.HK) to participate in investor conferences in September, focusing on biopharmaceutical innovations.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in Shanghai, Everest Medicines (HKEX: 1952.HK) disclosed that Ian Woo, the newly appointed President, would be leading operations. Everest, a prominent biopharmaceutical entity, specializes in pioneering therapies regarding discovery, clinical trials, production, and distribution. This change signals their commitment to furthering innovative treatment methods.

There were emotional scenes on the Liverpool docks at the weekend as families remembered the thousands of Chinese sailors who helped the Allies overcome facism in WWII. Many seamen settled in Liverpool and had families there, before being brutally deported after the war ended.

data.title: Xi'an, China represents fusion of heritage and innovation, showcasing technology's role in inclusive growth.
data.description: Located in northwest China, Xi'an is a city steeped in history as the starting point of the ancient Silk Road. As part of the "Into Tech Park" series, this edition sheds light on how technology is driving inclusive growth in the region. This showcases China's ability to blend tradition with innovation.

data.title: PRIMA launches Miami Marketplace with over 70 top restaurants like Sparrow, MILA, Estiatorio Milos, Catch, Queen, L'Atelier de Joël Robuchon, connecting high-value guests with venues.
data.description: Several popular restaurants in Miami, including Sparrow, MILA, Estiatorio Milos, Catch, Queen, and L'Atelier de Joël Robuchon, have signed up with a new platform aimed at connecting esteemed guests with sought-after dining establishments. This platform, named PRIMA, was launched on August 25, 2025. PRIMA serves as a hospitality marketplace focused on bridging the accessibility and operational efficiency challenges within the dining industry. The platform aims to streamline the process for high-value patrons to secure reservations at these renowned venues, offering a solution for enhancing the dining experience.

data.title: ROKFORM introduces new magnetic power banks in 10,000mAh and 5,000mAh models for active lifestyles.
data.description: In Irvine, California on August 25, 2025, ROKFORM unveiled two advanced magnetic power banks. The first is the 10,000mAh Wireless Magnetic Power Bank with Stand, offering high capacity for prolonged use. The second is the 5,000mAh Magnetic Power Bank, designed for on-the-go charging needs. ROKFORM is renowned for its durable and high-performance mobile accessories, and these new releases aim to uphold that reputation.
